name: Cam-CAN 'Bang! You're Dead' Movie fMRI
description: Naturalistic movie-watching fMRI from the Cam-CAN cohort: ~649 participants spanning the adult lifespan watched a condensed Hitchcock film ('Bang! You're Dead', ~8 min). A key resource for studying naturalistic social cognition and ageing.
citation: Taylor JR, et al. (2017). The Cambridge Centre for Ageing and Neuroscience (Cam-CAN) data repository. NeuroImage, 144, 262–269.
